meta.title: Applo - AI-powered job applications
meta.description: Create personalized job applications with AI assistance

cookieBanner.text: We only use strictly necessary cookies to keep you signed in and to submit forms securely. No tracking takes place. Learn more in our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong
errorPage.description: An error occurred while loading this page.

serviceWorker.updateDescription: Reload the page to get the latest version of Applo. Unsaved input in open forms will be lost.

fileUpload.dropPrompt: Drag a file here or click to browse
fileUpload.errorTooLarge: The file is too large. The maximum size is 10 MB.
fileUpload.errorInvalidType: Invalid file type. Only PDF and DOCX files are allowed.
fileUpload.errorGeneric: The file could not be uploaded.
